title: Vanilla  Reimagined
description: Enhanced Minecraft while keeping it simple and vanilla
body:
I didn't like how plain and simple Minecraft was, so I fixed it :)

This whole project is inspired by [demonjoeTV's](https://www.youtube.com/@demonjoeTV) videos as they have inspired me to create this


I will only be updating this pack like twice a year just to keep it updated with the current version, but in the future, I hope for this to be a popular pack used among many people.
## 
## IMPORTANT INFORMATION
**IMPORTANT** You _NEED_ to change the keybinds in  order for some of the functions to work like the do a barrel roll mod and the zoomify mod
## CREDITS
_**Also**_ I included a resource pack from [vanilla tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net) for things such as the hearts, enchantment glint and some textures
